name: Leipzig (Saxony, Germany)

colors.symbolism: from the city's coat of arms
from the city's coat of arms

description: A horizontal bicolour of blue over yellow, with the city's coat of arms charged on the centre.
history: Leipzig's blue-and-yellow flag, with the city's coat of arms, has been used by the municipality since the 19th century; the colours and arms derive from the medieval Margraviate of Meissen.

features.symbolism: the historic civic colours of Leipzig
the Meissen lion and the Landsberg pales, recalling the city's medieval rulers
